title: Fragment: Rome And Nature.
content:
Rome has fallen, ye see it lying
    Heaped in undistinguished ruin:
    Nature is alone undying.
meaning:
Percy Bysshe Shelley's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Fragment: Rome And Nature."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
